title: Flora Biome™ Live Probiotic
body_html:
• Supports Total Gut Health Optimization
  • 3-in-1 Prebiotic Probiotic & Postbiotic
  • Organic Liquid, Derived from Holistic Fermentation
  • 10 Probiotics Strain
  • Prebiotics from 18 Medicinal Herbs
  • Abundant Postbiotics from Fermentation

Flora Biome™ provides your gut everything it needs for vibrant health. Our live-culture probiotics are derived from the fermentation of 10 probiotic strains, with each serving delivering actual live-culture probiotics. It contains 18 fermented herbs that provide essential prebiotics to promote the growth of gut bacteria. The fermented probiotics produce postbiotic metabolites such as enzymes, amino acids, short-chain fatty acids, and chelated vitamins and minerals. Postbiotics deliver immediate health benefits across the entire body and gut.

title: GLP-Activate: Hunger & Metabolism Support
body_html:
A Daily Mealtime Companion for Metabolic Support*

GLP-Activate pairs seven thoughtfully selected botanicals and nutrients into a mealtime supplement designed to complement a balanced lifestyle.*

  • Supports Healthy Metabolic Function*
  • Supports Healthy Digestion*
  • Designed to Be Taken With Meals
  • Vegan, Non-GMO, Third-Party Tested

Results may vary. Best used alongside a healthy diet and regular exercise. These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

title: GLP-Pre: GLP-1 Prebiotic Fiber Complex
body_html:
Feed Your Gut Cells & Support Natural GLP-1 Pathways*

GLP-Pre™ supplies clinically studied resistant starch, XOS and mushroom β-glucans that nourish intestinal L-cells—the gut messengers that naturally release GLP-1 after meals. The result: balanced appetite cues and everyday metabolic wellness, all powered by nutrition—not drugs.*

Promotes Beneficial Bacteria & Short-Chain Fatty Acids*

Our targeted fiber matrix selectively fuels Akkermansia, Bifidobacterium and Lactobacillus. Their fermentation yields butyrate, acetate and propionate—metabolites that strengthen the gut barrier, foster digestive comfort and help maintain healthy metabolic function.*

title: AK-Postbio: Akkermansia Probiotic 30 Billion TFU
body_html:
AK-Postbio: Akkermansia Probiotic 30 Billion TFU - Max Strength, Clinically Validated Dose & Patented Strain - Superior Pasteurized Form, Highest Absorption, Delivery - GLP-1 Probiotic - 30 Servings

Akkermansia muciniphila is a native to the human microbiome and very important to our overall health. A diet high in processed foods, added sugars, and low in fiber is often linked with a drop in levels.

Akkermansia is shown to play a vital role in overall gut health and natural metabolism; and is even shown to play a crucial role in natural GLP-1 production.

title: CranEaze Urinary Tract Support
body_html:
• Formulated with Scientifically Backed Ingredients: CranEaze is formulated with the scientifically backed dose to support fewer UTIs and shorter UTIs when they occur. It also supports the prevention of UTIs from occurring. *
  • Superior Cranberry Juice Extract, 100% Soluble PAC: Other cranberry pills for women are derived from whole cranberries or pomace. Clinical evidence shows that cranberry juice extract is the most effective in maintaining urinary tract health. Clinical studies show PAC from juice extract is up to 300% more effective than PAC from whole cranberry and pomace.
  • 100% Soluble PAC, Most Effective Form: A cranberry supplement must contain 100% soluble PAC to be effective; most are not. Soluble PAC comes from juice extract.

    CranEaze® is a potent cranberry juice extract containing 36 mg PAC (Proanthocyanidins) - the optimal dose to support urinary tract health, as demonstrated by scientific studies. Our formula is further fortified with D-Mannose to help counteract bacteria in the urinary tract. With CranEaze®, you can minimize the frequency, duration, and intensity of UTI's.*

title: Nasomin Nasal Cleanse
body_html:
• Nasomin is designed to help cleanse and refresh the nasal passages as part of your daily hygiene routine.
  • Exposure to dust, debris, and everyday environmental particles is common. Nasomin can be used to gently cleanse the nose, helping wash away unwanted buildup and support a feeling of nasal cleanliness. A few sprays in the nasal cavity help rinse and refresh the nasal passages for regular use.
  • Nasomin contains a natural mineral complex, formulated with ingredients such as iodine and fulvic acid, and is intended for nasal cleansing purposes only.

title: L-Methylfolate (15 mg) Plus Methyl-B12
body_html:
• Absorbs directly into the bloodstream and requires no processing from the body.
  • Contains the essential Cofactor MethylB12.
  • Supports brain and heart health and contributes to balancing energy, hormones, and mood

L-Methylfolate is the biologically active, bloodstream-ready form of Folate (Vitamin B9). Our formulation provides a maximum strength dose of 15 mg L-Methylfolate. This strength was formulated to support optimal folate levels. The formula also includes a whole serving of Methyl-B12, an essential cofactor to L-Methylfolate. The liquid sublingual form provides enhanced absorption and an enjoyable cherry flavor. It also contributes to the production of neurotransmitters, which are involved in maintaining focus, regulating sleep patterns, providing energy, balancing hormones, and impacting mood. Furthermore, Methylfolate promotes heart health and optimal nerve function.*

title: L-Methylfolate (15 mg) Plus Methyl B12 Capsules
body_html:
L-Methylfolate is a bioactive form of folate (B9) that requires fewer metabolic conversion steps in the body. This can help support efficient absorption and utilization. Formulated with Methylcobalamin B12 to help maintain healthy homocysteine metabolism, support normal nerve function, and promote cardiovascular well-being by aiding natural nitric oxide pathways.*

A high-quality supplement formulated to help support a positive mood, promote healthy energy levels, enhance mental clarity, and encourage restful sleep.*

Our high-quality L-Methylfolate and Methyl B12 supplement is formulated based on clinical research to support healthy methylation. Each capsule provides 15 mg of L-Methylfolate (5-MTHF) plus 500 mcg of Methyl B12. L-Methylfolate is a biologically active form of folate that requires minimal conversion by the body. This formulation is designed to help support a healthy mood and brain function.*

Furthermore, Methylfolate promotes heart health and optimal nerve function.*

body_html:
• 21x more concentrated than the leading beet capsules on the market.
  • Nearly identical to fresh juicing without the hassle.
  • Enhanced with BioPerine Black Pepper Extract to enhance absorption.

    The best beets, cold-pressed and CO2 dehydrated, create the purest and most potent beet extract on the market. BioBeets. It is uncommonly powerful, with 21x the concentration to maximize all the health benefits beets offer. One serving of Organic BioBeets Extract is all you need to support your heart health, aid in lowering your blood pressure, and boost your energy and stamina. It is results you can feel…21X faster.

title: Femositol Capsules - Inositol Complex
body_html:
• Clinically Validated 40:1 Ratio: FemoSitol combines Myo-Inositol and D-Chiro Inositol in the ideal 40:1 ratio, meticulously designed to support hormonal balance in women.
  • Reproductive Health Support: This supplement is engineered to potentially aid in promoting regular ovulation and menstrual cycles while supporting overall reproductive health and ovarian wellness.
  • Enhanced Metabolic Health: FemoSitol is dedicated to promoting metabolic wellness by assisting in maintaining a healthy balance, essential for overall health.

    FemoSitol® offers a premium inositol supplement specifically formulated to meet the unique needs of women. It leverages the synergy of Myo-Inositol and D-Chiro Inositol to support hormonal balance and reproductive health effectively. These naturally occurring compounds are crucial in optimizing metabolic pathways, potentially leading to improved regularity in menstrual cycles and enhanced ovarian health. Additionally, our rapid absorption formula ensures that each dose is efficiently utilized by the body, maximizing its benefits.

title: BioActive B12 Liquid: Vitamin B12 Plus L-Methylfolate
body_html:
• BioActive delivers 3 most beneficial forms of Vitamin B12: Methylcobalamin, Adenosylcobalamin, and Hydroxocobalamin.
  • Contains a full serving of L-Methylfolate, an essential cofactor of B12.
  • Designed to raise overall B12 status levels and support mitochondrial energy production, metabolism, and detoxification.

    BioActive B12 is full-spectrum vitamin B12. The formulation contains the 3 essential bioactive forms of B12; Methylcobalamin, Adenosylcobalamin & Hydroxocobalamin. Each form of B12 works along different biological pathways within the body. The formula also provides a whole serving of L- Methylfolate (vitamin B9), an essential cofactor of B12.

title: Ashwa-70™ Ashwagandha Extract
body_html:
Size: 60 Capsules - 60 Servings

Maximum strength and extended release for unparalleled results.

  • The industry-leading concentration of withanolides for potency.
  • Increase your body's ability to adapt to and handle physical, mental, and emotional stress.
  • Contains 21 different bioactive withanolides, making it the most full-spectrum Ashwagandha.

Ashwa-70™ is a max potency ashwagandha extract with 35% withanolide concentration and 70 mg of withanolides per capsule. The withanolides are the active nutrient in ashwagandha, giving it potent health benefits. It is also formulated with BioPerine® black pepper extract for enhanced absorption. Ashwagandha is an adaptogenic herb that increases the body's ability to adapt to and handle physical, mental, and emotional stress. It is shown to improve athletic performance, increase testosterone, improve sleep quality, and lower stress and anxiety.

body_html:
Size: 360 Tablets - 90 Servings

  • The purest, most nutrient-dense Spirulina in the world

Spirulina is a potent source of all essential amino acids, phytonutrients, vitamins, and minerals. It is the most nutrient-dense food on the planet. We are proud to offer the world's purest and most potent source of Organic Spirulina; don't believe us? Just look at the certifications and data; they speak for themselves.

title: Quercetin Complete
body_html:
Size: 60 Capsules - 60 Servings

  • 50 times higher absorption and bioavailability than standard Quercetin, providing proven health benefits.*
  • Clinically proven and backed by seven studies to support enhanced immunity, improve respiratory health, combat seasonal allergies, and boost athletic performance.*
  • With Vitamin C and Bromelain as co-factors, Quercetin Complete optimizes the absorption and utilization of Quercetin.

Quercetin Complete is a high-performance Quercetin formulation derived from a Quercetin phytosome. In clinical studies, the Quercetin phytosome, Quercefit®, had a 50x higher absorption rate than standard Quercetin, supported by 13 clinical studies showing proven health benefits. The formulation is also enhanced with Quercetin cofactors, Vitamin C & Bromelain, and a whole serving of Zinc, which has a codependent relationship with Quercetin.*

Quercefit® is a registered trademark of Indena, S.p.A, Italy

title: Plant-D3 Organic Vitamin D3 Liquid Concentrate
body_html:
• Plant-D3 is an organic, plant-based source of vitamin D3 that provides 5000 IU of cholecalciferol in just 6 drops.
  • The sublingual absorption of Plant-D3 is up to 264% more efficient than oral capsule absorption, resulting in faster and higher absorption rates*.
  • By bypassing processing by the liver and entering the bloodstream directly, Plant-D3 offers a highly bioavailable form of vitamin D3 that can help meet your daily nutritional needs.

Plant-D3® is an organic plant-based source of Vitamin D3. It is derived from sun-grown algae that produce a highly bioavailable form of cholecalciferol (vitamin D3). The liquid sublingual form allows for higher and faster absorption rates. Sublingual D3 is shown to bypass processing by the liver and enter the bloodstream directly*.

title: Total Selenium - 200 mcg, Plant-Based Selenium
body_html:
Size: 60 Capsules - 60 Servings

  • 100% Plant Based Selenium, Derived from Garlic: Using a cutting-edge organic farming process and the most nutrient-dense form of garlic, we are able to provide a 100% plant-based and whole food form of Selenium.
  • Full-Spectrum Selenium Contains 4 Organic Forms: Total Selenium provides all 4 organic forms of Selenium, including Selenomethionine; this provides the body the different bioactive forms of Selenium in order to address broad spectrum health needs.
  • Most Bioavailable Selenium: They are the naturally occurring forms of Selenium commonly found in foods and are easily recognized and utilized by the body.

    Total Selenium® provides all 4 organic forms of Selenium, including Selenomethionine; this provides the body the different bioactive forms of Selenium in order to address broad spectrum health needs. Each form has different functions and works along different pathways within the body.

title: SoActive Berberine
body_html:
• Optimized Absorption Excellence: Experience a breakthrough with our Berberine phytosome, offering 9.6X higher absorption compared to standard Berberine, ensuring maximum body utilization.
  • Natural Metabolism & Weight Support: Clinically shown to optimize blood sugar levels and balance hormones, our Berberine provides a holistic approach to support sustainable weight loss and metabolic health.
  • Gastrointestinal Comfort Assured: Bid farewell to the common stomach discomforts associated with Berberine. Our advanced formula ensures optimal absorption without the digestive distress.

    The realm of natural weight management and blood sugar balance has often been dotted with uncertainties. Each SoActive® Berberine capsule encapsulates clinically validated doses, designed for optimal absorption and maximum benefit. Experience the potent benefits of our unique Berberine phytosome and set forth on a transformative path to natural well-being and sustainable weight control.

title: Creatine Reserve™ Dual Pathway Creatine Complex
body_html:
Dual Pathway, Not Single Pathway. Most creatine on the market is just monohydrate. Monohydrate alone is built for muscle — it goes to the cells that power physical performance, fills your stores, and stops there. Creatine Reserve adds 750 mg of GAA, the molecule your body uses to make its own creatine. GAA crosses the blood-brain barrier through SLC6A8, the brain’s preferred transporter. The muscle version can’t use this pathway.*

The Cognitive Part of Your Stack, Consolidated. Reserve replaces the separate creatine, GAA, B-complex, and taurine bottles most longevity stacks already include. One capsule. Active methylated B6, B9, and B12 — the cofactors your body actually uses to convert creatine and GAA into the phosphocreatine your brain runs on.*

No Loading. No Bloat. No Powder. The 20–25 g loading phase is the reason creatine got its bloat reputation. Reserve skips it. 3,000 mg + 750 mg GAA daily reaches saturation in 3–4 weeks. Capsules — no scoops, no shakers, no flavors, no grit.*

title: Kids Methylfolate Plus B12 Cofactor
body_html:
• Essential For Brain Development, Mood & Behavior Support: Supports healthy neurological growth, cognitive function, and focus during critical developmental years, helping lay the foundation for lifelong learning and mental clarity. Promotes balanced neurotransmitter activity for mood regulation, helping children feel calm, focused, and emotionally resilient.*
  • Bioactive Form of Folate - Organic Berry Flavor: Provides L-Methylfolate, the active and bioavailable form of folate that is ready for the body to use, ensuring optimal support for children with MTHFR gene variations. The formula is a tasty, kids friendly organic berry flavor that can be added to any beverage.
  • Organic Certified Formula with B12 Cofactor: Includes methylcobalamin B12 to complement L-Methylfolate, ensuring complete methylation support for optimal brain and nervous system health.* The formula is organic certified, Vegan, GMO Free, Gluten Free, Sugar Free.

title: Ionic Zinc Liquid Supplement
body_html:
• Most effective form of Zinc available.
  • Support your total body health.
  • Easy to adjust doses to support your entire family.

Zinc is an essential trace mineral needed for every family member's health. Our liquid zinc is delivered in its natural ionic form, maintaining its active electrical charge. It is more effective than capsules due to its rapid and complete absorption into the bloodstream. Zinc supports immunity, thyroid health, metabolism, mood, digestion, growth, and development in children.

title: Siberian Rhodiola (Rhodiola Rosea Extract)
body_html:
Size: 60 Capsules - 60 Servings

  • Siberian Rhodiola contains 5% Rosavins & 2% Salidroside, making it more effective Rhodiola on the market.
  • Grown in the Siberian tundra, Siberian Rhodiola is delivered in a raw form, DNA verified, and enhanced with patented BioPerine for optimal absorption.
  • Vegan, GMO-free, soy-free, and gluten-free, and proven to boost mood, brain function, energy, and physical performance.

Siberian Rhodiola® delivers the highest balanced concentration of active nutrients with 5% Rosavins & 2% Salidroside. It is grown in its natural habitat of, the Siberian tundra. The frigid climate leads to the highest expression of active nutrients. Siberian Rhodiola® has long been known to be the best in the world. Rhodiola supports the functioning of the adrenal gland and encourages a healthy stress response. It boosts mood, enhances cognitive function, and assists in relieving chronic fatigue.
